message: The other night, we had a surprise blackout. After the initial gasp of disbelief, I suddenly felt a rush of pride. I was actually prepared this time! I grabbed my trusty flashlight and my power bank, feeling like a superhero in my own living room. The kids thought the lantern was like camping indoors, and we even turned it into a little game, telling stories in the cozy glow. It reminded me how nice it is to stay comfortable and connected, even when the lights go out. I used to dread these moments, but now I see them as a chance to bond with my family. If you’re curious about how to stay prepared for the next unexpected blackout, this little refresher helped me a lot! What’s your favorite way to keep the mood light during a power outage?
